particulars.description: All that freehold property known as unit 1-6 great western close, birmingham, B18 4QG registered at hm land registry under title number WM908102.
All that freehold property known as 211-215 tyburn road, erdington, birmingham, B24 8NB registered at hm land registry under title numbers WM541444, WK190468 and MM17873.

A legal charge over: 1) the leasehold land at great western close, handsworth, birmingham registered at hm land registry under title number WM908102, 2) the freehold land on the west side of all saints street, winston green, birmingham registered at hm land registry under title number WM909936, 3) the leasehold land on the south west side of lawford close, nechells, birmingham registered at hm land registry under title number WM858201 and 4) the freehold land at 211 and 215 tyburn road and to the north west side of 211-215 tybrun road, birmingham B24 8NB registered at hm land registry under title number WM541444, WK190468 and MM17873.

1) the leasehold land at great western close, handsworth, birmingham registered at hm land registry under title number WM908102.. 2) the freehold land on the west side of all saints street, winston green, birmingham registered at hm land registry under title number WM909936.. 3) the leasehold land on the south west side of lawford close, nechells, birmingham registered at hm land registry under title number WM858201.. 4) the freehold land at 211 and 215 tyburn road and to the north west side of 211-215 tyburn road, birmingham B24 8NB registered at hm land registry under title numbers WM541444, WK190468 and MM17873.

The company charges land at great western close, handsworth, birmingham t/no WM908102. The company assigns the goodwill of any business carried on upon the property from time to time (together with any licences relating to the same under the licensing act 2003) subject to redemption upon payment of the secured amount.
